_comment: SEED DATA generated from the community exploration log (venus_map.json). Venus is a 60x30 toroidal grid; 46 zones charted so far. Real-Venus sulfuric palette. Regenerate via the content repo as exploration progresses.

theme._comment: Real-Venus tones: creamy sulfuric clouds over a dark sky.
theme.label: #FFF4E0
